title: Bridge Essay: The parietal lobe and tool use.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through The, parietal, lobe, and, tool.

**The parietal lobe and tool use.** — Handb Clin Neurol. PMID: 29519476. DOI: 10.1016/B978-0-444-63622-5.00025-5. The ability to craft and use tools is acrucial skill of human beings, distinguishing humans from all other species. Humans show aunique capacity to create novel, technologically advanced devices and represent physical causality using tools. In the present chapter we review the effect of tool use in changing body-space multisensory integration and body representation and the fundamental contribution of the parietal lobe to the neural underpinnings of tool use.
